mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2% increase in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over the past 6 months signals rising demand and inflation expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 4% signals a tight labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-UNRATE periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the Industrial Production Index (INDPRO) above 2% signals rising supply and economic growth, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and the number of Housing Starts (HOUST) signals rising demand and housing market activity, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-CPI and high-HOUST periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) below 3% signals an easing monetary cycle, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A joint decline in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 4% and an increase in the number of Nonfarm Payrolls (PAYEMS) signals a tight labor market and rising employment, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in low-UNRATE and high-PAYEMS periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in the Real Disposable Personal Income (RSAFS) signals rising demand and consumer spending, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.
